reason_of_clustering: These entities represent different maturities of live cattle futures contracts, allowing investors to manage exposure to price movements in the live cattle market over various time horizons.
Similar to live cattle futures, these entities are focused on different delivery months for feeder cattle contracts, enabling traders to hedge or speculate on feeder cattle prices at different times.
This cluster encompasses all cattle futures contracts, illustrating the overall dynamics of the cattle market and providing investors with insights into both live and feeder cattle prices and trends.
